pattern: Apple system colors as HSL tokens in globals.css
implementation: :root { --background: 0 0% 98.4%; --foreground: 240 6% 10%; --primary: 211 100% 50%; --primary-foreground: 0 0% 100%; --destructive: 4 86% 58%; --muted: 240 5% 96%; --border: 240 6% 90%; } .dark { --background: 0 0% 0%; --foreground: 0 0% 96%; }
anti_pattern: Keeping shadcn default slate/zinc tokens without mapping to Apple semantic colors
notes: HSL tokens match Apple's #fbfbfd background #1d1d1f foreground and systemBlue #2997ff

pattern: --background matching Apple light surface
implementation: --background: 0 0% 98.4% maps to #fbfbfd; --card: 0 0% 100%; --popover: 0 0% 100%
anti_pattern: Default white #ffffff background not matching Apple's off-white grouped background
notes: Apple uses #fbfbfd not pure white for primary backgrounds on macOS and iOS web

pattern: --radius set to Apple button radius
implementation: --radius: 0.75rem in globals.css (12px matching Apple's standard button corner radius)
anti_pattern: Keeping --radius: 0.5rem or using component-level radius overrides inconsistently
notes: 12px matches Apple button corner radius; use calc(var(--radius) - 2px) for inner elements

pattern: Button height variants matching Apple HIG
implementation: cn(buttonVariants({ size: 'default' })) → h-[50px] px-5; size: 'sm' → h-8 px-3 text-sm; size: 'lg' → h-14 px-8 text-base
anti_pattern: Custom button heights not aligned to Apple's 44-50px default touch target
notes: Apple HIG minimum touch target is 44px; default button 50px matches iOS button height

pattern: Switch styled as iOS toggle
implementation: Switch component overrides in globals.css: [role='switch'] { width: 51px; height: 31px; } [role='switch'][data-state='checked'] { background: hsl(var(--primary)); } [role='switch'] span { width: 27px; height: 27px; }
anti_pattern: Default Radix switch styles without iOS proportions
notes: iOS toggle is 51x31pt with 27pt circular thumb; wider and taller than generic toggle

pattern: Dialog styled as Apple formSheet
implementation: <Dialog><DialogContent className='sm:rounded-2xl sm:max-w-md'> with CSS: .dialog-content { border-radius: 1.25rem; box-shadow: 0 25px 50px rgba(0 0 0 / 0.25); }
anti_pattern: Full-screen or square-cornered dialog without sheet proportions
notes: Apple sheets use 20px corner radius and present from bottom with grab handle on mobile

pattern: AlertDialog matching Apple alert layout
implementation: <AlertDialog><AlertDialogContent className='rounded-2xl max-w-[270px] text-center'><AlertDialogFooter className='flex-col sm:flex-col gap-0 divide-y'><AlertDialogAction /><AlertDialogCancel /></AlertDialogFooter></AlertDialogContent>
anti_pattern: Wide alert dialogs with side-by-side buttons
notes: iOS alerts are 270px wide with stacked buttons divided by hairlines and centered text

pattern: Select and DropdownMenu matching Apple picker style
implementation: <Select><SelectContent className='rounded-xl'><SelectItem className='rounded-lg h-11'>...</SelectItem></SelectContent></Select>
anti_pattern: Small item heights or sharp corners on dropdown menus
notes: Apple menus use rounded containers with 44px item height and subtle hover fill

pattern: Tabs styled as iOS segmented control
implementation: <Tabs className='bg-muted p-1 rounded-xl'><TabsList className='gap-1'><TabsTrigger className='rounded-lg data-[state=active]:bg-background data-[state=active]:shadow-sm h-8'>
anti_pattern: Underline-only tab indicator without pill background
notes: iOS segmented control uses filled pill indicator on grouped background

pattern: Input with Apple text field dimensions
implementation: <Input className='h-11 rounded-lg px-3 border-border bg-background placeholder:text-muted-foreground/60' />; globals.css: input { font-size: 17px; }
anti_pattern: Small 32px inputs or Material-style outlined inputs with floating labels
notes: Apple text fields are 44px height minimum with 8px radius and 17px body text

pattern: Card with continuous corners and Apple shadow
implementation: <Card className='rounded-2xl border-0 shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] bg-card'>
anti_pattern: Sharp-corner cards or heavy drop shadows not matching Apple elevation
notes: Apple cards use 16-20px corner radius and very subtle elevation (2-8px spread)

pattern: Sheet component matching iOS sheet behavior
implementation: <Sheet><SheetContent side='bottom' className='rounded-t-2xl h-auto max-h-[90vh] pb-[env(safe-area-inset-bottom)]'><div className='mx-auto w-12 h-1.5 bg-muted rounded-full mb-4' /></SheetContent></Sheet>
anti_pattern: Slide-in side sheets as primary mobile modal pattern
notes: iOS sheets slide up from bottom with grab handle and safe area bottom padding

pattern: Sonner toast with Apple notification banner style
implementation: <Toaster toastOptions={{ className: 'rounded-xl shadow-lg bg-background/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-0 text-sm font-medium' }} position='top-center' />
anti_pattern: Bottom-center toasts or Material-style snackbars
notes: Apple banners appear top-center with frosted glass background and rounded corners

pattern: NavigationMenu for Apple-style nav bar
implementation: <NavigationMenu className='border-b backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/72 sticky top-0 z-50'><NavigationMenuList className='max-w-[980px] mx-auto px-5 h-[52px]'>
anti_pattern: Static nav without glass effect or incorrect height
notes: Apple nav bar is 44-52px tall with frosted glass background and centered or leading title

pattern: ScrollArea with custom Apple-style scrollbar
implementation: <ScrollArea className='h-full'><style>{'[data-radix-scroll-area-scrollbar] { width: 4px; } [data-radix-scroll-area-thumb] { background: rgba(0 0 0 / 0.2); border-radius: 2px; }'}</style></ScrollArea>
anti_pattern: Native browser scrollbar on content areas within app chrome
notes: Apple scrollbars are thin (4px) semi-transparent overlays that auto-hide

pattern: Popover matching Apple popover style
implementation: <Popover><PopoverContent className='rounded-xl shadow-xl border-0 bg-background/90 backdrop-blur-xl p-0 w-64'>{items.map(item => <PopoverItem key={item.id} />)}</PopoverContent></Popover>
anti_pattern: Flat bordered popover without blur or rounded corners
notes: Apple popovers use frosted glass background with rounded corners and shadow

pattern: Inter font as SF Pro fallback in tailwind.config
implementation: tailwind.config: { theme: { extend: { fontFamily: { sans: ['Inter var' '-apple-system' 'BlinkMacSystemFont' 'system-ui' 'sans-serif'] } } } }
anti_pattern: Tailwind default font stack without -apple-system or Inter for web
notes: SF Pro renders on Apple devices; Inter provides closest match on other platforms

pattern: shadcn dark class with Apple dark tokens
anti_pattern: Relying on prefers-color-scheme only without .dark class for manual toggle support
notes: Apple dark mode: true black #000000 background #f5f5f7 text #2997ff blue

pattern: cn() for Apple interaction state classes
implementation: <button className={cn('transition-opacity' pressed && 'opacity-60' disabled && 'opacity-30 pointer-events-none' loading && 'cursor-wait')}>
anti_pattern: Inline style for pressed/disabled states or !important overrides
notes: Apple HIG: 60% opacity on press disabled elements at 30% opacity

pattern: Framer Motion wrapping shadcn components
implementation: const MotionCard = motion(Card); <MotionCard initial={{ opacity: 0 y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 y: 0 }} transition={{ type: 'spring' stiffness: 400 damping: 35 }}>
anti_pattern: CSS transitions only for entering/exiting components
notes: Wrapping Radix primitives with Framer Motion adds spring physics for Apple-caliber feel

pattern: Skeleton matching Apple loading patterns
implementation: <Skeleton className='h-5 w-48 rounded-md bg-muted animate-pulse' />; custom: @keyframes shimmer { from { background-position: -200% 0 } to { background-position: 200% 0 } }
anti_pattern: Spinner-only loading or no loading state for content areas
notes: Apple shows content silhouettes at accurate dimensions to minimize layout shift on load

pattern: Form with Apple inset-grouped layout
anti_pattern: Stacked label-above-field form without grouped container
notes: iOS Settings-style inset grouped form: rows separated by hairlines inside rounded container

pattern: Separator matching Apple opaqueSeparator
implementation: <Separator className='bg-border/60' />; globals.css: --separator: rgba(60 60 67 / 0.29); .dark { --separator: rgba(84 84 88 / 0.65); }
anti_pattern: Default separator using full-opacity border color
notes: Apple's opaqueSeparator is semi-transparent allowing background to show through

pattern: Badge with Apple tinted button style
implementation: <Badge className='rounded-md px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium bg-primary/15 text-primary border-0 hover:bg-primary/20'>
anti_pattern: Solid background badges or pill shapes without tint relationship
notes: Apple tinted style uses 15% opacity of semantic color for background with matching text
